query:
UPDATE complementItems ci
INNER JOIN complementGroups cg ON ci.groupId = cg.id
INNER JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id
SET ci.price = CAST(CAST(ci.price AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 100 AS DECIMAL(10,2))
WHERE p.establishmentId = 150004 AND CAST(ci.price AS DECIMAL) >= 100;
